sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32836" key="e)krine/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκρῑνέω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ῥίνη</etym>) <sense id="n32836.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">file away, consume,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὴν καρδίαν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.33</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
